title: Xi-Putin summit: ~40 deals signed as Iran war disrupts China's energy supply — Power of Siberia 2 pipeline progresses
snippet: Chinese President Xi Jinping and Russian President Vladimir Putin held a summit in Beijing where approximately 40 deals were signed, with energy cooperation as a central theme driven by the Iran war's disruption to China's oil imports. The two leaders 'reached understanding on main parameters' for the Power of Siberia 2 gas pipeline, a long-stalled project that has gained urgency as the Iran war has disrupted roughly half of China's oil imports transiting the Strait of Hormuz. The summit underscores how the Iran-US conflict is accelerating Russia-China energy integration and reshaping global energy trade patterns. Iran and Ukraine were also top agenda items, with both leaders calling for diplomatic solutions.
tag_reason: 신규 — 시진핑-푸틴 베이징 정상회담, ~40건 협정 서명, 시베리아의 힘 2 가스관 진전은 새로운 사건. 이란전쟁이 중국 에너지 공급에 미치는 영향과 러중 에너지 협력 가속화 맥락
